programme.title: The Obama Legacy: First Joint Interview Post-White House
Nightline
programme.desc: In-depth reporting on one or more of the major stories in the news, with occasional segments on pop culture; journalists Juju Chang and Byron Pitts share hosting duties for this late-night program.

programme.desc: Providing prime-time context and analysis of the day's top stories, as well as in-depth reporting and storytelling from around the country and the globe.

Nightline
programme.desc: In-depth reporting on one or more of the major stories in the news, with occasional segments on pop culture; journalists Juju Chang and Byron Pitts share hosting duties for this late-night program.
Police and surveillance footage show the obsession of a stalker who tormented a young woman -- even holding her in a soundproof box -- while she fights for her life and freedom.
When a young woman goes missing and another is found beaten in a nearby town, detectives learn that one of the victims holds the answers to both crimes in her hand.

programme.title: On the Red Carpet Presents: Toy Story 5
programme.desc: The voice cast of "Toy Story 5" walks the red carpet and Disney+ captures all the fun!

programme.title: What Would You Do?
programme.desc: Using hidden cameras, host John Quiñones observes and comments on how ordinary people behave when they are confronted with dilemmas that require them either to take action or to walk by and mind their own business. Various scenarios are created that force people to make split-second -- and often surprising -- decisions, and variations of the situation (such as changing the genders, races or clothi

programme.title: Live: Jesse Watters Primetime
programme.desc: Jesse Watters speaks with newsmakers from across the U.S. to present news with a clear and direct approach.

programme.title: Live: Hannity
programme.desc: Sean Hannity interviews political figures and newsmakers and offers his own conservative perspective on events.

programme.title: Gutfeld!
programme.desc: Greg Gutfeld looks at the news of the day through a satiric lens fused with pop culture and features his takes on the day's headlines.

programme.title: Live: Fox News at Night
programme.desc: Hard news and analysis of compelling stories from DC and across the country; journalists provide viewers with must-see information and consequential news.

programme.title: The Five
programme.desc: Dana Perino, Greg Gutfeld and Jesse Watters and rotating liberal co-hosts Jessica Tarlov and Harold Ford Jr. discuss and debate the hot issues across the spectrum from politics to pop culture.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A jaywalker darts on a mad dash through the weeds; things go badly for a suspect on a stolen motorcycle when choppers help officers track him down; a domestic dispute leads cops to a slew of unexpected crimes.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A suspect believes he sees monsters; two women in a hotel rumble; sorting out where two motorists got their car and whose dope they have.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: An uncooperative suspect obeys instructions from a relative; uncovering crack rock; trying to get the truth out of two known drug users.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A suspect's bizarre driving techniques; searching a man accused of shooting up the neighborhood; an officer deals with a suspect's denial before finding crack.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A resistant suspect gets too many chances from an understanding cop; a driver lets a friend borrow his car; a man's lie to police.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A defiant suspect gets a K-9 bite; a former fiancé pays his ex an unwanted visit; warrants, pregnancy and meth in a routine traffic stop.

programme.title: Live: Weather Command Weekend

programme.title: Fox Business in Depth: Roadmap to the Future
programme.desc: Cheryl Casone hosts Fox Business In Depth: Roadmap to the Future as America celebrates 250 years. The U.S. leads in making transportation innovative, facing a new revolution with China. Driverless and air taxis emerge, with some infrastructure projects stalled like California's high-speed rail. Cheryl and experts discuss the future of planes, trains, and automobiles.

programme.title: Maria Bartiromo's Wall Street
programme.desc: Maria Bartiromo brings together prominent figures from Wall Street to discuss emerging economic trends and empower long-term investors.

programme.title: Barron's Roundtable
programme.desc: A weekly prime-time series that features interviews with investors and major industry leaders about what to expect in the week ahead on Wall Street.

programme.title: Kudlow Weekend
programme.desc: Following the closing bell, economist Larry Kudlow covers stock market analysis, financial and business news of the day, and looks at some of the most pressing economic issues impacting everyday Americans.

programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Historic Silver Set
programme.desc: Add the Set of 20 Truly Historic Morgan Silver Dollars in Brilliant Uncirculated condition to your numismatic collection today; with only about 1% of all Morgan Dollars grading in uncirculated condition, examples like these are Condition Rarities.

programme.title: Historic USA Gold
programme.desc: Secure the only .9999 fine pure gold coin with the dual date featuring 1776, the year of our nation's founding and the Liberty Bell privy. This 1776-2026 American Gold Buffalo is graded perfect PF70UCAM in an exclusive 250th anniversary holder.

programme.title: Historic USA Gold
programme.desc: Secure the only .9999 fine pure gold coin with the dual date featuring 1776, the year of our nation's founding and the Liberty Bell privy. This 1776-2026 American Gold Buffalo is graded perfect PF70UCAM in an exclusive 250th anniversary holder.

programme.title: 1776 Rare USA Gold
programme.desc: Own the 1776-2026 American 1oz Gold Buffalo featuring a Liberty Bell Privy mark, celebrating 250 years of the USA, and graded PF70UCAM; struck from .9999 pure gold using the classic Buffalo Nickel design, it's one of the rarest releases this year.

programme.title: Paid Programming
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: American Gold: The Legend of Bear Gulch
programme.desc: Veteran miners the Dale Brothers use their life savings to buy over 60 long-abandoned mines in Bear Gulch, Mont., to prove that the old timers who quit the mines 80 years ago missed one of the largest untapped gold structures in America.

programme.title: American Gold: The Legend of Bear Gulch
programme.desc: A catastrophic cave-in forces the Dale brothers to find a new path to Ole's Gold while John tries to open a pipeline to the deep one by melting the ice in the B&H.

programme.title: American Gold: The Legend of Bear Gulch
programme.desc: A cache of unexplored rounds left by the old timers could blow the Dale brothers' path to the deep ore sky-high; tensions boil over at the Pete & Joe as the brothers race to Ole's Gold before winter.

programme.title: American Gold: The Legend of Bear Gulch
programme.desc: A shocking discovery throws Ole's legend into doubt, so the Dale brothers spend 48 hours searching their claims for proof that Bear gulch is on the brink of a gold boom.

programme.title: American Gold: The Legend of Bear Gulch
programme.desc: A gold-rich sample turns the Mohave mine into a new target for the Dales, so the family rushes to save the site's 80-year-old mill and machine shop before an impending winter storm causes them to collapse.

programme.title: American Gold: The Legend of Bear Gulch
programme.desc: The Dales find a 50-foot swamp of subterranean muck standing between them and Ole's Gold.

programme.title: American Gold: The Legend of Bear Gulch
programme.desc: The Dale Brothers race to replace a failing cap beam in the Pete & Joe #3 before it collapses under the weight of seven stories of earth and brings their hunt for Ole's Gold to a disastrous end.

programme.title: American Gold: The Legend of Bear Gulch
programme.desc: The Dale's enlist the next generation to tackle the mud pit standing between them and Ole's Gold, while oldest brothers Rick & John launch a frontal assault on the ice blocking their path to the deep ore.

programme.title: American Gold: The Legend of Bear Gulch
programme.desc: Winter chases the Dales out of Bear Gulch, but a break in the weather gives them one last shot to find Ole's Gold this season.

programme.title: American Gold: The Legend of Bear Gulch
programme.desc: A terrible discovery dashes the Dale brothers' plan to reach Ole's gold, but a clue left by the old timers reveals an unexpected path to the prize.

programme.title: American Gold: The Legend of Bear Gulch
programme.desc: Veteran miners the Dale Brothers use their life savings to buy over 60 long-abandoned mines in Bear Gulch, Mont., to prove that the old timers who quit the mines 80 years ago missed one of the largest untapped gold structures in America.

programme.title: American Gold: The Legend of Bear Gulch
programme.desc: A catastrophic cave-in forces the Dale brothers to find a new path to Ole's Gold while John tries to open a pipeline to the deep one by melting the ice in the B&H.

programme.title: Jewish Jesus
programme.desc: A supernatural and prophetic discovery of the Jewish Jesus. Messianic Rabbi Kirt Schneider, a Jewish believer in Jesus and end-times messenger of the LORD, delivers the Word of the LORD with the true passion of the Holy Spirit.

programme.desc: An uncooperative suspect obeys instructions from a relative; uncovering crack rock; trying to get the truth out of two known drug users.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A suspect believes he sees monsters; two women in a hotel rumble; sorting out where two motorists got their car and whose dope they have.

programme.title: CBS Saturday Morning
programme.desc: Each Saturday morning, Adriana Diaz and Kelly O'Grady report on the week's top stories the broadcast, known for its signature segments The Dish and Saturday Sessions, offers insightful conversations with artists, authors, chefs and musicians.

programme.title: CBS News Weekender
programme.desc: Delving into the biggest stories of the week beyond just the news of the day, featuring original reporting and exclusive interviews along with lifestyle and pop-culture coverage.

programme.title: CBS News Weekender
programme.desc: Delving into the biggest stories of the week beyond just the news of the day, featuring original reporting and exclusive interviews along with lifestyle and pop-culture coverage.

programme.title: CBS News Weekender
programme.desc: Delving into the biggest stories of the week beyond just the news of the day, featuring original reporting and exclusive interviews along with lifestyle and pop-culture coverage.

programme.title: CBS News Weekender
programme.desc: Delving into the biggest stories of the week beyond just the news of the day, featuring original reporting and exclusive interviews along with lifestyle and pop-culture coverage.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: This newsmagazine investigates intriguing crime and justice cases that touch on all aspects of the human experience. Over its long run, the show has helped exonerate wrongly convicted people, driven the reopening -- and resolution -- of cold cases, and changed numerous lives. CBS News correspondents offer an in-depth look into each story, with the emphasis on solving the mystery at its heart. The program and its team have earned critical acclaim, including multiple Emmy, Peabody and Edward R. Murrow Awards.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: This newsmagazine investigates intriguing crime and justice cases that touch on all aspects of the human experience. Over its long run, the show has helped exonerate wrongly convicted people, driven the reopening -- and resolution -- of cold cases, and changed numerous lives. CBS News correspondents offer an in-depth look into each story, with the emphasis on solving the mystery at its heart. The program and its team have earned critical acclaim, including multiple Emmy, Peabody and Edward R. Murrow Awards.

CBS News correspondents offer an in-depth look into each story, with the emphasis on solving the mystery at its heart. The program and its team have earned critical acclaim, including multiple Emmy, Peabody and Edward R. Murrow Awards.
